rationale: The cited paper is a core mechanism paper on moral/licensing processes (prior virtuous acts boosting self-concept and increasing indulgent choice), which is conceptually close to the citing paper’s mechanism claims about entitlement/justification driving socially costly consumption. Given this strong theoretical overlap in sequential self-justification/indulgence logic, the citation could plausibly be a substantive theory source rather than a perfunctory mention. With only DOI-level match evidence and no context snippet, it is not safe to drop as obvious mention-only.
